query: Write a short email to the allotment committee proposing a new compost rota, in my voice.

gold.task_prompt: Propose a new compost rota to the allotment committee, in my voice.
gold.style_notes: Persona p002: terse, plain, proper capitalisation, full stops, no emoji, formal sign-off ('Regards'). Subtle style; cross-genre (only one email reference) makes this hard.

metadata.scoring_note: Hard: subtle/plain style, few email references, cross-genre transfer from terse notes to a committee email.
